overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a rainy urban night scene in a video game (GTA V style). The player navigates wet streets with reflective puddles, passes industrial warehouses and neon billboards, crosses a busy intersection with moderate vehicle traffic, and ends waiting as a large truck approaches. The atmosphere is moody with artificial street lighting and heavy rain.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial warehouse district with wet streets

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet industrial street, passing warehouses on the left

entered.detail: large brick industrial building with multiple illuminated windows
large illuminated billboard with orange and yellow burger advertisement
rain-soaked street with reflective puddles and street light reflections

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rainy night in an industrial district. The camera walks straight down a wet asphalt street lined with a large warehouse building on the left featuring glowing windows. A bright burger restaurant billboard dominates the right side of the frame, casting orange light onto the rain-slicked pavement. Street lights illuminate the hazy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along multi-lane road approaching intersection

events.description: turns right at the corner, transitioning from warehouse street to sidewalk along busier road

agents.ego_description: turns right at the intersection and continues walking along the sidewalk, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: dark-colored car driving down the wet street with headlights on

entered.detail: red and white billboard advertising auto repairs with phone number
tall metal pole with traffic signal and street light

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right at the corner, leaving the warehouse district behind. Now walking along a concrete sidewalk next to a multi-lane road, an auto repair billboard appears on the left. Vehicles with headlights on begin appearing on the right side of the frame as the camera approaches a busy intersection. The rain continues to fall on the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy multi-lane intersection with gas station

events.description: begins crossing the multi-lane intersection, navigating between moving vehicles
large delivery truck approaches from the left and stops at the intersection

agents.ego_description: crosses the wide intersection, moving between lanes of traffic while vehicles pass by

notable_agents.action: large white delivery truck with red logo approaching the intersection from the left
black sedan waiting at the traffic light

entered.detail: large white semi-truck with red 'BIG GOODS' text on the trailer
illuminated gas station price sign with green and red lights
low concrete divider in the middle of the intersection

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the wide intersection, crossing the rain-soaked asphalt marked with white crosswalk lines. A large white delivery truck with 'BIG GOODS' branding approaches from the left and comes to a stop. Various cars navigate the intersection, their headlights reflecting off the wet pavement. A gas station sign glows in the distance on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection center median with waiting traffic

events.description: stops walking and waits in the middle of the intersection
character's hands become visible in the lower frame, confirming first-person perspective

agents.ego_description: waits in the intersection center as the large truck stops nearby, then raises hands into view

notable_agents.action: large white delivery truck stopped facing the camera with headlights illuminating the rain
white van driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: character's hands clasped together, visible in first-person view at bottom of frame

segments.scene_description: The camera stops in the center of the intersection, waiting as the large delivery truck pulls up and stops directly ahead, its bright headlights cutting through the rain. Traffic continues to flow around the intersection. Near the end of the segment, the character's hands suddenly become visible in the lower frame, confirming the first-person perspective as the rain continues to fall on the wet pavement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a rainy industrial district that culminates in a tense standoff at a busy urban intersection. It begins by walking down a wet asphalt street where the orange glow of a burger restaurant billboard and the windows of a large warehouse reflect off the rain-slicked pavement. As the camera turns right at the corner, the industrial buildings give way to a concrete sidewalk and a multi-lane road, with an auto repair billboard appearing as vehicle headlights emerge through the haze. The scene then expands into a wide, rain-soaked intersection marked by white crosswalk lines, where the camera navigates through flowing traffic toward a distant, glowing gas station sign. Finally, the movement comes to a halt in the center of the road as a large white delivery truck branded Big Goods pulls up directly ahead, its bright headlights cutting through the rain just as the character's hands become visible in the lower frame.
